title: Event subscriptions
excerpt: description: Subscribe to Vectorize events such as index inserts and deletes using Queues. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/vectorize/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Event subscriptions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/queues/event-subscriptions/) allow you to receive messages when events occur across your Cloudflare account.…
